untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 2.5σ deviation from 20-day mean and comparison to >1 year baseline expectations. Price_pos_20 approximates position within recent range but cannot measure sigma deviations or multi-year historical baseline comparisons. No allowed indicator directly measures statistical deviation thresholds or long-term anomaly detection against year-long expectations.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: price_pos_20 < 0.025 (price in lower 2.5% of 20-day range) as proxy for 2.5σ lower deviation; vol_ratio_20 > 2.5 (volume 250% of average) maps directly to volume condition. Exit conditions use RSI mean-reversion as analytical validation proxy, but the core signal's requirement for baseline expectation violation over multi-year horizons cannot be expressed with available indicators. The directive to trim 25% and conduct 5-minute analysis is a behavioral/timing instruction outside quantitative rule scope.
